---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a platform capability or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement

---

## Problem

What problem should this solve?

## Proposed outcome

Describe the desired capability without prescribing unnecessary implementation
details.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Configuration is reproducible from Git.
- [ ] Security and access are documented.
- [ ] Monitoring and failure behaviour are defined.
- [ ] Backup and restore needs are defined.
- [ ] Rollback is documented.

## Alternatives

What other approaches were considered?

## Architecture decision

Does this require a new or superseding ADR? If so, link it here.
